REQUIREMENT: Canonical run_dir always exists before status or outputs
IMPLEMENTATION: createSwitchingRunContext at start; on error before run_dir, allocateSwitchingFailureRunContext (createRunContext only; no ad hoc run_failure_* mkdir)
execution_status.csv with EXECUTION_STATUS=FAILED (final); run_manifest.json when allocated via createSwitchingRunContext; fingerprint from createRunContext
writeSwitchingExecutionStatus(...,isFinal=true) writes one-row table via temp file + movefile replace
PARTIAL checkpoints use isFinal=false (overwrite); final SUCCESS/FAILED uses isFinal=true once
Removed inner catch; allocateSwitchingFailureRunContext failure raises run_switching_canonical:FailureRunAllocation with original error text
failTablesDir/failReportsDir mirror success; mkdir before writes
No manifest rewrite on failure; new failure run gets full writeManifest from createRunContext only
Atomic replace for final SUCCESS/FAILED minimizes truncated execution_status.csv
